description_long: This doll has a humanoid animatronic appearance with a distressed, decayed exterior, featuring a greenish-yellow surface marred by numerous tears, holes, and exposed endoskeleton parts. The head is large and rounded, with one ear partially missing and the other bent, and the face is marked by hollow, dark eye sockets and a wide, jagged mouth. The limbs and torso are covered in rips and gashes, revealing internal mechanical components and wires, with some areas showing red, fleshy textures. The hands and feet are oversized and claw-like, with fingers and toes ending in blunt, rounded tips. The overall surface is rough and patchy, with visible seams, exposed joints, and a generally unsettling, worn-out look. This doll evokes a horror or animatronic theme, reminiscent of characters from the Five Nights at Freddy's franchise.
description: A distressed, animatronic humanoid doll with a greenish-yellow, torn exterior, exposed endoskeleton, and a horror-themed appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's hollow eyes, jagged mouth, torn chest, and damaged left ear.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the protruding jaw, exposed wires, and the bent ear on top.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head, exposed spine, and more tears along the limbs and torso.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the damaged right arm, more exposed endoskeleton, and the doll's hunched posture.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the doll's body is composed of a torn, animatronic shell with exposed mechanical and synthetic elements, featuring a horror-themed, distressed look.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms slightly bent at the elbows, left arm hanging lower and right arm more forward, legs straight and feet flat on the ground, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral to menacing, with hollow eye sockets, a wide open mouth with jagged edges, and no visible eyebrows or emotional cues.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth and mechanical with torn patches and exposed endoskeleton.
